name: Bean Busy
short_description: Bean Busy is a maze chase game inspired by arcade classics of the early 80s. A colorful collection of items, obstacles, and (of course) beans await! Tackle one labyrinth after another while outwitting the monsters on your tail. Invite a friend and chase that high score together!
detailed_description:
Bean Busy is an early 80s inspired maze chase game with lots to explore!

Features:

  • 23 Unique Levels with additional Bonus Stages

  • All manner of Hazards and Tools to find during your journey

  • Numerous Monsters with distinct AI patterns to master

  • Cooperative play, with accommodated Stage design

  • Controller Support for 1 or 2 players

  • Gameplay that Loops Indefinitely for the truly Super Players!

Controls:

  • Player 1 uses WSAD

  • Player 2 uses Arrow Keys

    (Launch the game with 1 or 2 controllers already plugged in for them to map correctly)

  • Pressing "1" Starts a 1-Player game, and "2" Starts a 2-Player game

  • Holding alt and pressing enter will enable/disable true fullscreen mode

Thank you for checking out Bean Busy!

Credits:

Hornbuckle Who - Game
Joaquin Masimelli - Spanish Localization
